calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Real And Personal Property To The Thomas Family Trust
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Real And Personal Property To The Thomas Family Trust
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Zelis appeared by telephone for Dorothy Johnson (Trustee).

Mr. Zelis stated that the assets have been pretty much collected, that there is more than what was set out to the beneficiaries, and that the Trustee has paid all of the beneficiaries their initial share, except for Leslie Jackson who died. Mr. Zelis also stated that he put out notice to all of the beneficiaries and family, that he has received no information regarding Leslie or any estate, that Ms. Jackson's attorney has not responded, that they asked the beneficiaries if they wanted to pursue Heggstad or the civil matter, and that no one wants to pay any money. In addition, Mr. Zelis stated that he and the Trustee are thinking of dismissing both actions and doing a final further distribution in pro rata shares, and that the balance may possibly go to Ms. Jackson or her heirs. The Petition to Determine Title to and Require Transfer of Real and Personal Property to The Thomas Family Trust is continued to December 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Real And Personal Property To The Thomas Family Trust
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The Petition to Determine Title to and Require Transfer of Real Property, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To Jul-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Relief Under Probate Code 17200, Petition To Compel Account, Petition To Remove Trustee, And Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Taylor for Petitioner.
Bruce Zelis appeared by telephone for Dorothy Johnson (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Taylor informed the Court that his Client is deceased. Mr. Zelis stated that they have a heggstad petition on calendar for May 3, 2017. The Petition for Relief Under Probate Code 17200, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Real And Personal Property To The Thomas Family Trust
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To May-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Relief Under Probate Code 17200, Petition To Compel Account, Petition To Remove Trustee, And Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Continued To Apr-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Application To Order Deposit Of Proceeds Of Sale In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Relief Under Probate Code 17200, Petition To Compel Account, Petition To Remove Trustee, And Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with petitioner Leslie Page; Bruce Zelis (by CourtCall) for Dorothy Johnson.

The Court notes that there are some notice issues which need to be addressed. Mr. Taylor stated that there are two people, the Dana and Ernest Moore, who are not findable, and that he would be filing an ex parte application for an order waiving notice to them. He said that two grandchildren have received notice through notice to their mother. Mr. Zelis stated that he can provide the address of the Moores, and said they are on his service list. He also said that he planned to file a Heggstad Petition to address assets questions. Mr. Taylor informed the Court that he understood the house was being offered for sale for a "fire sale" price of around $850,000.00, or $300,000 under current market value. Mr. Zelis responded that this understanding was incorrect, as the haouse is being marketed for $1,200,000.00, and that he has received a no contingency full price offer. The Court said that the sale of the property was not before him today and that he would not address it at today's hearing. The matter was continued to April 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Petition For Relief Under Probate Code 17200, Petition To Compel Account, Petition To Remove Trustee, And Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Continued To Mar-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
